race.comment: VELLA'S BEST (1) comes here after a placing in Saturday company last start behind a handy type who has since won again. Gets in nicely here with the claim of Sinclair and should be able to find the front from an inside barrier. Ticks plenty of boxes and can get back to winning ways. FAMOSO (10) profiles nicely for a race like this as he worked through the grades last campaign. His recent trial on this surface was superb and Cahill hops on board for his return. Can sit just off the speed and land the knockout blow late in the race. KING GUTHO (3) went up to Queensland again and disappointed at the Magic Millions, but he had won over the 1000m the start prior. He's a classy customer who performs well fresh and can't be left out of calculations. PLEASURIZE (7) is racing in good order and can feature in the finish again. RAVALLI (8) is third-up here and the form out of his last start has worked out well. Keep safe.
